subject: Probable GRB030112B seen by SPI ACS
body:
The ISDC Shift Team and the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS GRB team reports:

A possible GRB has been seen in the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS light curve on
03-01-12 at 21:50:13 UT. The duration of the GRB is very short at
approx. 0.20s. No position information is available. The lightcurve
is available at
ftp://isdcarc.unige.ch/arc/FTP/ibas/spiacs/2003-01-12T21-50-13.0000-00000-00000-0.lc
